info.name: EventOS API Test Suite
info.description: Unified API Collection to test EventOS microservices (Auth, CRM, Event, Gallery) directly and via the API Gateway (port 8080). Contains complete demo payloads matching the seed database.

request.description: Logs in the user through the API Gateway. Updates the collection level `accessToken` and `tenantId` variables automatically.
Logs in the user directly to the Auth Service (Port 8081). Updates the collection level `accessToken` and `tenantId` variables automatically.
Registers a new tenant workspace and owner via the Gateway.
Refreshes the Access Token using a Refresh Token.
Lists the active login sessions for the current authenticated user context.
Invites a new team member to the workspace (Owner/Admin privileges required).
Gets a mock captcha details (triggered after 3 failed login attempts).
Logs out user by clearing cookie/session context.
Generates a reset password token in system logs.
Resets user password with active reset token.
Revokes specific login session for security.
Accepts a workspace invitation and sets owner/staff password.
Switches active workspace context utilizing rotated token.
Fetches branding, timezone, currency for company.
Lists active members and roles in current tenant.
Invites team member from settings portal.
Lists all sales leads for the workspace.
Gets details of a single lead by its ID.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Priya & Arjun Sharma",
  "email": "priya.sharma@gmail.com",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "eventType": "WEDDING",
  "eventDate": "2026-12-20",
  "budget": 550000.00,
  "leadSource": "REFERRAL",
  "notes": "Client wants full-service wedding: photography, decoration, catering management. Very particular about floral arrangements. Leela Palace preferred."
}

request.description: Creates a new lead with demo details.
Logs an activity against a specific lead.
Updates status of a lead to move them in the pipeline.
Creates a Quote for a Lead with complete itemization.
Gets details of a single Quote by ID.
Approves the quote which promotes the linked lead status to WON.
Fetches pipeline value, conversion rate, statistics.
Creates a revision copy of quote.
Marks quote status as REJECTED internally.
Lists quotes linked to authenticated client email.
Records a trace of client viewing quote.
Forces rebuild of quote PDF document.
Gets pipeline lead analytics count by status.
Lists all bookings. Note that API Gateway rewrites `/api/v1/bookings` to `/api/v1/events/bookings` on Event Service.
Gets details of a single booking by ID.
Converts an approved Quote directly into a Booking.
Lists all events in the event-service (Gateway routes `/api/v1/events/**` -> port 8083 `/api/v1/events/**`).
Gets budget metrics for a booking.
Records a payment transaction against a booking.
Gets materials, equipments reserved for booking.
Fetches audit trail tracking state changes.
Pushes estimation data to create CRM Lead.
Directly produces proposal quote from estimation.
Fetches budget limit, expenses, and delta.
Acknowledges or clears active alert warning.
Gets chronological setup, events for day.
Lists staff roles allocated to event.
Scans overdue tasks and raises alerts.
Fetches metrics dashboard view (events stats, revenue, profit).
Triggers asynchronous email notification for invoice.
Sends manual payment reminder to client.
Verifies client-submitted payment and triggers ledger updates.
Enables client to submit transaction ID for bank transfer payment.
Increments actual payments made to vendor.
Creates a new gallery album for a booking.
Generates a secure link to share the album with the client.
Triggers zip download stream of album photos.
Requests credentials for direct cloud upload.
Confirms asset details to database after cloud upload.
Direct multipart form upload to server filesystem.
Lists share links generated for album.
